title: BSSC Office Attendant Mains Admit Card 2026 for 100 Post
short_information: Bihar Staff Selection Commission BSSC has released the recruitment of Senior Scientist Assistant SSA Exam 2022 for 100 posts whose advertisement is 02/2022. This is a great opportunity for the candidates who are looking for government jobs in Bihar. Those Candidates Are Enrolled with Vacancy Can Download the Result. For information related to this recruitment of Bihar BSSC, eligibility, age limit, important date, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information read the advertisement. Bihar Staff Selection Commission BSSC Bihar Senior Scientist Assistant SSA Competitive Exam 2022 BSSC SSA Advt No. : 02/2022 Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : 540/- SC / ST / PH : 135/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Mode Only. BSSC Senior Scientist Assistant 2022

tables.table_name: BSSC Senior Scientist Assistant 2022 Age Limit as on 01/01/2022 Minimum Age : 21 Years. Maximum Age : 37 Years . for Male Maximum Age : 40 Years . for Female Age Relaxation Extra as per BSSC Senior Scientist Assistant Vacancy 2022 Recruitment Rules .
rows: Bachelor Degree / Master Degree in Related Post / Trade in Any Recognized University in India.

text_sections.section: How to Fill BSSC Senior Scientist Assistant Exam 2022 Online Form
text_sections.content: Bihar Staff Selection Commission BSSC 3rd Graduate Level Combined Competitive Exam Various Post Recruitment 2022. Candidate Can Apply Between 14 April 2022 to 17 May 2022. | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in Bihar SSC Latest Jobs 2022. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
